description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the starefossen/ruby-node:2-5 Docker image and a before_script that installs bower globally, runs bower install --allow-root, installs jekyll and bundler gems, and runs bundle install --path=.bundler-cache. Cache the .bower-cache, .bower-registry, and .bundler-cache directories. Define three stages: test, deploy, and release. In the test stage add a test job that runs jekyll build -d test, saves the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test, runs jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. In the release stage add a publish job that depends on test, runs gem build jekyll-creative.gemspec, makes prepare-publish.sh executable, executes it with $GEMS_API_KEY, and pushes the resulting gem with gem push, and only runs on tag pipelines.
